name: Zuora
description: Zuora subscription management and recurring billing platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Zuora
2. Go to Settings → Administration → OAuth Client Management
3. Create a new OAuth Client
4. Enter the Client ID and Client Secret below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Zuora → Settings → Administration → OAuth Client Management

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Zuora → Settings → Administration → OAuth Client Management

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Zuora billing platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Zuora users to verify billing access is managed
